subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath dawned from the horizon of the All-Merciful upon the world of humanity and illumined it with light [3.5s]... ...In marriage the more distant the blood-relationship the better, for such distance in family ties between husband and wife provideth the basis for the well-being of humanity
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی من الافق الرحمانی علی العالم الانسانی و اضاء بالنور
subcodes.subjects: @laws of marriage and dowry, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
